creator: sson@freebsd.org
text:
databases/firebird25-client seems to be a x86 only port...

root@crack:/usr/ports/databases/firebird25-client # uname -p
armv6
root@crack:/usr/ports/databases/firebird25-client # make
===>  firebird25-client-2.5.3_2 is only for i386 amd64, while you are running armv6.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped

How do I reproduce this?
